playlist_theme: Ultimate Summer Beach Workout Music – Open Ocean Fitness Training

tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental gym workout music. Tropical House subgenre, 120 BPM, C Major. A vibrant, sun-kissed groove perfect for a beach warmup. Features a deep, bouncy sub-bass style paired with crisp, driving four-on-the-floor drum patterns and snappy claps. Lush, airy synth textures and steel-drum inspired plucks create a euphoric summer atmosphere. Arrangement builds steadily with a strong melodic hook introduced within the first 5 seconds to grab attention. The gym motivation vibe is uplifting and energizing, setting a positive tone for the session. High energy dynamics with sweeping risers and bright crashes. Hi-fi modern production quality with wide stereo imaging and clean professional mastering for commercial release quality gym music.

youtube_metadata.title: SUNRISE SHRED ⚡ Beach Warmup Music | Start Strong
youtube_metadata.description: Kick off your beach workout with this uplifting tropical house anthem! 🌴 Let the ocean breeze and driving beats fuel your fitness journey. Perfect for cardio, stretching, and getting into the zone. 🌊 Drop a like and let's sweat! #BeachWorkout #GymMusic #TropicalHouse #FitnessMotivation

tracks.thumbnail_image_prompt: Cinematic photography, waist-up framing of a fit, muscular athlete doing a beach warmup at sunrise. Sweaty workout realism, wearing modern bright athletic leggings and a breathable sports top. One strong central subject striking a powerful stretching pose against the open ocean. Dramatic cinematic rim lighting from the golden hour sun creating sweat highlights. Layered depth with a clear focal point, subtle atmospheric ocean mist, and negative space around the subject. Background features shallow depth of field waves, perfect for parallax animation, high contrast, visually striking.

tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental gym workout music. Slap House subgenre, 126 BPM, F Minor. A driving, relentless groove designed for high-intensity cardio. Features an aggressive, metallic FM bass style that cuts through the mix, supported by punchy, tight kick drums and sharp hi-hat patterns. Dark, moody synth textures add tension before exploding into a massive, bouncy drop. Arrangement focuses on building momentum, delivering a strong, infectious bass hook within the first 5 seconds. The gym motivation vibe is focused and aggressive, pushing the listener to their limits. High energy dynamics with rapid transitional fills. Hi-fi modern production quality, booming low-end, and clean professional mastering for commercial release quality gym music.

youtube_metadata.title: OCEAN BURN ⚡ Intense Cardio Mix | Push Your Limits
youtube_metadata.description: Turn up the heat with this high-energy Slap House banger! 🔥 Designed for intense cardio and beachside running. Feel the rhythm push you past your limits. You've got this, keep moving! 🏃‍♂️💨 Subscribe for more elite workout tracks. #CardioWorkout #SlapHouse #GymMotivation #RunningMusic

tracks.thumbnail_image_prompt: Cinematic gym photography, waist-up athlete framing. A fiercely focused female athlete sprinting on the beach, sweaty workout realism. Wearing sleek, modern black training gear. One strong central subject. High contrast lighting with dramatic mid-day sun, hard shadows, and lens flares. The ocean waves crash in the blurred background. Deep cinematic layered composition, shallow depth of field separating the crisp foreground subject from the hazy, bright ocean background. Bold shapes, minimal clutter, optimal for slow zoom and parallax animation. Visually striking and highly readable on mobile screens.

Arrangement is breathless and continuous, opening with an immediate rhythmic hook in the first 5 seconds. The gym motivation vibe is adrenaline-fueled and triumphant. High energy dynamics with soaring crescendos. Hi-fi modern production quality, precise transient response, and clean professional mastering for commercial release quality gym music.

tracks.thumbnail_image_prompt: Cinematic photography, waist-up framing of a ripped male athlete in mid-sprint on a sandy beach. Sweaty workout realism, wearing a minimalist modern sports tank top. High energy dynamics driven by syncopation rather than volume. Hi-fi modern production quality, rich acoustic resonance, and clean professional mastering for commercial release quality gym music.
